You are solving a quantified Boolean formula (QBF). Your output should be the word true, or the word false, depending on the truth value of the formula.
The formula is specified in the QDIMACS format.
Variables are numbered 1..N; negative literals mean negation.
Do not run tools or commands; answer directly.
